series_metadata.series_description: Records compiled and used as reference tools to do legal, case law, statutory, or general research. Records include, but are not limited to, court decisions, law journal articles, memos discussing legal issues, statutes, subject files, sampled briefs and pleadings, and any other information that is used for general reference purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
